rows.label: qev040403_MSG0001
rows.name:
Satsuuu! Where are you-mo!
I'm tired of searching and my tummy is rumbling-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell him the truth that Satsu has been found.

rows.label: qev040403_SEL0021
rows.name: Say that Satsu has gone on a journey.

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hearing that makes Yoyotsu
even hungrier-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0004
rows.name: I'm going to hurry back and eat a meal with everyone-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0005
rows.name: Oh my goodness-mo! That's so sad-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0006
rows.name:
But eating a lot of food on behalf
of the ones left behind is[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0007
rows.name: a form of encouragement for the one embarking on a journey-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0008
rows.name:
My heart feels like it's going to burst,
but I'll eat until my tummy bursts instead-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0009
rows.name:
...You were just joking?
Satsu has returned to the caravan-mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0010
rows.name:
I don't really like being tricked,
but I'm happy-mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev040403_MSG0011
rows.name:
I'm going to hurry back and eat
a lot of food in celebration-mo![ST:wait ]
